name: Radware AppWall WAF
description: Radware AppWall Web Application Firewall REST API for managing WAF policies, security profiles, protected applications, and attack monitoring

auth_config.note: Uses HTTP Basic Authentication or HTTPS-based RESTful API calls

actions.name: List Protected Applications
actions.description: Retrieve all web applications protected by AppWall

actions.name: Get Protected Application
actions.description: Retrieve details of a specific protected application

actions.name: List Security Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all WAF security policies configured on the AppWall

actions.name: Get Security Policy
actions.description: Retrieve a specific WAF security policy and its settings

actions.name: Update Security Policy
actions.description: Update WAF security policy settings and protection levels

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: ID of the security policy to update

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Updated policy settings including protection mode, security level, and filter configurations

actions.name: List IP Groups
actions.description: Retrieve all IP groups used for access control (block/allow lists)

actions.name: Add IP to Block List
actions.description: Add an IP address to the WAF block list for immediate blocking

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: ID of the IP group (block list)

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: IP entry including ip_address, mask, and description

actions.name: Get Security Events
actions.description: Retrieve WAF security events including attack detections and blocks

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start time for event query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End time for event query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by event severity (low, medium, high, critical)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

actions.name: Get Resource Monitoring
actions.description: Retrieve AppWall resource monitoring data including bandwidth, CPU, memory, and traffic levels
